sla_extraction.Vehicle Model: Corolla Altis (Indian market equivalent of Corolla XLE)
sla_extraction.Maintenance: Lessee is responsible for regular maintenance (oil changes, tire rotations, brake checks). For minor repairs (< %20,000), Lessee covers full cost. For major repairs (> %20,000), Lessor covers 50%, Lessee covers remainder. Lessee must use Lessor-approved authorized service centers.
sla_extraction.Dispute Resolution: First, amicable negotiation. If failed, arbitration by a sole arbitrator in accordance with the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996, with the seat in Mumbai, India. If arbitration not applicable, disputes resolved in courts of Mumbai.
sla_extraction.Return Conditions: Upon termination, vehicle must be returned in a condition consistent with normal wear and tear. Security deposit may be used to cover unpaid rents, fees, or repairs not considered regular wear and tear.
